title: Blue Hobbledehoo Toddler Safety Harness with leash For Kids Aged 2-7 Years, Child Harness For Walking & Play Autism Safety Awareness
features: Robust Safety Features: This special needs harness is engineered to ensure the utmost safety and strength. This safety harness is ideal for special needs children, including those with autism or ADHD, providing essential security and support

Versatile Harness: This harness has a 1.2m leash, enhancing security and control while allowing your child some independence. Perfect as a walking harness for toddlers and a safety harness for older children, it ensures your child always stays safe

Adjustable Child's Harness: This child safety harness can be tailored to fit various sizes, making it ideal for toddlers and kids aged 2-7. For older children, the Hobbledehoo XL is perfect for kids aged 7+, providing a secure fit as your child grows

Ease of Use: This safety harness features a strong quick-release buckle and sturdy front and back handles. This child leash and harness system offers parents and caregivers stress-free control during any activity, enhancing safety and reducing hassle

Sturdy & Comfortable Harness: This child harness is designed with durable materials for strength and comfort. Whether worn in the summer or over bulky winter clothes, it keeps your child comfortable wherever they are on a busy street or in a park
